description: UPDATE with no WHERE rewrites all 6M rows — RS-PERF WARN. NOTE: "unqualified" here means the missing WHERE clause, the usual SQL sense. It does NOT mean an unqualified TABLE NAME — this migration deliberately writes the qualified `public.accounts`. The table-name case is perf-unqualified-table-name; the two were easy to confuse and one was mistaken for coverage of the other during review.
